analysis.primary_subject: Kitchen cabinetry installation with visible wiring and unfinished sections

craftsmanship_quality.precision: Medium - The cabinetry appears to be aligned well, but some sections show gaps and uneven edges.
craftsmanship_quality.surface_quality: Medium - The surfaces are smooth but show signs of handling and minor imperfections.
craftsmanship_quality.attention_to_detail: Medium - The installation is functional but lacks fine detailing and finishing touches.

portfolio_presentation.accompanying_text: This image showcases the assembly stage of a modern kitchen cabinetry installation. The focus is on the structural framework and initial electrical setup, highlighting the foundational work before final finishing touches.
